title: Dave Inc Reports Q3 2025 Earnings: Revenue Soars 63%, Record Profitability
text:
Dave reported total revenue of $150.8 million for Q3 2025, representing a 63% year-over-year increase from $93 million in Q3 2024, significantly exceeding analyst expectations of $132.54 million, resulting in a 13.78% revenue surprise.

Adjusted EBITDA was $58.7 million, representing a 137% year-over-year increase from $24.7 million in Q3 2024, with the Adjusted EBITDA margin expanding by approximately 1,200 basis points year-over-year to 39%.

Key Financial Metrics:
- Net Income: $92.0 Million
- Adjusted Net Income: increased 193% to $61.6 Million
- Adjusted EBITDA: increased 137% to $58.7 Million
- ExtraCash origination volume: $2.0 billion, up 49% year-over-year from $1.4 billion
- Monthly Transacting Members: 2.77 million, up 17% year-over-year
- Annualized revenue per MTM: $217, up 39% year-over-year

Updated 2025 Revenue Guidance:
- Total Revenue: $544-547 million (up from $505-515 million), representing 57-58% year-over-year growth
- Adjusted EBITDA: $215-218 million

This represents exceptional performance driven by the successful implementation of new revenue optimization strategies and the deployment of CashAI v5.5 for enhanced credit underwriting.
